name: BAVANS Value Gate Pass Rate
description: Percentage of creative outputs that pass at least 3 of the 6 BAVANS value checks with no violations.
goalMapping: Enforces creative-control-layer integrity for Belief, Art, Vision, Aesthetic, Narrative, and Story.

escalation_policy.on_critical: Block publication pipeline and trigger human-in-loop governance review.
escalation_policy.on_warning: Trigger corrective narrative review and mandatory sign-off before release.
